next_steps: Bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL) for GMS stain, AFB smear/PCR, fungal culture, and viral PCR
Serum cryptococcal antigen, Histoplasma antigen (urine and serum), and blood cultures
High-resolution CT of the chest without IV contrast (if renal function is compromised) or with contrast for detailed parenchymal assessment
Initiation of respiratory support (high-flow nasal cannula or non-invasive ventilation) and intensive care monitoring
Baseline MRI brain with gadolinium to rule out CNS opportunistic infections given psychiatric symptoms and seizure history
